0._value: Speak nicely and be nice.

1._value: Trash talk and other abusive language while playing will result in bans.

2._value: No MapleStory administrator will ever ask for your password.

3._value: Don't tell anyone else your password!

4._value: Please contact Customer Support through the MapleStory homepage to report bugs.

5._value: Head to the official MapleStory website to see your rankings.

6._value: Participating in illegal activities, such as hacking, while playing will get you banned.

7._value: Use the system options in the menu to adjust the game sounds.

8._value: Use the game options in the menu to toggle ON/OFF chatting, trade, whisper, and other functions.

9._value: Some cash items can be deleted by placing them in the Item Incinerator.

10._value: Using trash talk or other abusive language while playing will result in bans.

11._value: To gift a cash item, select 'Buy', select 'Gift', then enter the name of the character you want to gift to.

12._value: Some cash items can be exchanged through cash item trade or the Auction House one time before they are used.

13._value: To use items purchased in the Cash Shop, you must double-click them to add them to your in-game Inventory first.

14._value: Using macros like automatic hunting programs can result in disconnections and bans against your account without warning.

15._value: Mesos and items cannot be duplicated. Please be wary of item fraud.

16._value: Please be aware that playing for too long may be harmful to your health.

17._value: You cannot get compensation for the restrictions you get from using illegal programs.

19._value: Please change your account password regularly to help protect your account.

0._value: Use shortcut keys (I, E, S, K, W, M, R, H) to easily open menus.

1._value: Find and use hidden portals in the map.

2._value: Press F1-F7 to express various emotions.

3._value: Use portals to move to other areas.

4._value: Portals to other areas are displayed in the Minimap as blue circles.

5._value: Press the Details button to see your stats in more detail.

6._value: All player characters will be shown as red dots on the Minimap.

8._value: Press Z to pick up items on the ground, or you can set your own Pick Up key in the Key Settings.

9._value: Press the Ctrl key to attack and the Alt key to jump.

10._value: You can buy equipment and potions for your adventure from NPC shops in the game.

11._value: You can distribute the AP you earn when you gain a level in the Stats window.

12._value: You cannot switch to different job after your 1st Job Advancement.

13._value: Double-click an equipment item in your Inventory window, or drag it into the Equip window to equip it.

14._value: Press W to open the World Map.

15._value: Press E to open the Equip window.

16._value: Press I to open the Inventory window to see the items you own.

17._value: Press M to open the Minimap.

18._value: Press K to open the Skill window.

19._value: Press S to look at your character's stats.

0._value: There is a shop in every town where you can purchase equipment and potions.

1._value: Some items can only be used by a certain gender or class. Double-check before you buy!

2._value: Be careful! Death will cause you to lose some EXP after you take your job advancement.

3._value: Completing quests will earn you items you can't find in shops.

3._value: Distribute Skill Points in the Skills window.

4._value: Be careful! Powerful monsters dwell in the underground dungeons.

5._value: Defeating more powerful monsters will earn you treasures not found in any shop.

6._value: MP recovers little by little after a set amount of time has passed.

7._value: Skills that cost MP cannot be used without MP.

8._value: Return Scrolls will get you back to town and back into action much faster than walking.

9._value: If you run out of Stars and Bullets, they will not disappear from your inventory.

0._value: [Notice] Please beware of sharing your personal information, as others could potentially use your Social Security number, phone number, account number, or other information for malicious purposes.

1._value: [Notice] Please beware of scams that ask for your personal information, as others could potentially use your phone number, account number, or other information for malicious purposes.

2._value: [Notice] Leaking other people's personal information, including but not limited to their Social Security number, phone number, or address, and using it for malicious or fraudulent purposes may result in a ban.

0._value: [Notice] If you notice players abusing a bug or using an illegal program, please report them on the official MapleStory website under Support > Report Abuse.
